name: classify_attendance_leave_functional
description: Ensures that the endpoint returns Leave status when leave_status is Approved.
input: POST /classify with AttendanceInput: employee_id='emp3', checkin_time=null, shift_start='09:00', leave_status='Approved', holiday_status='None', date='2024-06-01'
output: AttendanceOutput with success=True, attendance_status='Leave', message containing 'Leave'
